dilia.title: Dilia
dilia.subtitle: Restaurant
dilia.description: For over ten years, Dilia has been telling the story of Michele Farnesi's Italian cuisine: honest, precise and generous, inspired by his Tuscan roots and family memories. The restaurant's name pays homage to his grandparents and their love of good food passed down to him. In a warm and intimate setting, dishes are accompanied by a carefully selected wine list.

dilietta.title: Dilietta
dilietta.subtitle: Grocery & Catering
dilietta.description: Dilietta, opened in 2024, offers Michele's cuisine in a more accessible and everyday way. Antipasti, fresh pasta, lasagna, focaccia, cicchetti and homemade sweets bring life to the neighborhood. Every day at lunchtime, a set menu featuring pizza fritta or stuffed focaccia provides a quick and gourmet meal. Dilietta also offers catering services for weddings, events and corporate functions.

lacave.title: La Cave
lacave.subtitle: Wine Bar
lacave.description: Dilia la Cave, opened in 2021, extends the experience through wine. Here you'll discover rare and original references, sometimes unavailable elsewhere, and you can share a glass over cicchetti, homemade focaccia and Italian charcuterie, or take home a bottle for your personal cellar.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.subtitle: B2B
distribution.description: Import and distribution of exceptional Italian wines for professionals.
